description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service, define CONTAINER_IMAGE, DOCKER_DRIVER, and DOCKER_HOST variables, and add a before_script that logs in to registry.gitlab.com with the CI_JOB_TOKEN. Define a single stage named build and a build job that runs only for tags, triggers, or schedules. In the build job execute "docker pull $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest || true", then "docker build --cache-from $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest --tag $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_TAG --tag $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest ./$CI_COMMIT_TAG/", and finally push both "$CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_TAG" and "$CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest" to the GitLab Container Registry.
